basic_details.job_title: Oil India Contractual Electrician Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Oil India Recruitment 2026 OUT! Oil India Limited (OIL) has released 2 vacancies for the post of Contractual Electrician under Advt No. HRAQ/CONT-WP-B/26-287. Eligible candidates with Class 10th qualification, Trade Certificate in Electrician Trade, Valid Electrical Workman's Permit (Class I & Class II), and minimum two years of relevant work experience can participate in the walk-in selection process. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview on 05 August 2026 at the prescribed venue. The Oil India Contractual Electrician Recruitment 2026 is a temporary contractual engagement offering a fix

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: 35 years (General), 38 years (OBC NCL)
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years (General) Maximum Age: 38 years (OBC NCL)

qualification.education_qualification: Passed Class 10th, Trade Certificate in Electrician Trade, Valid Electrical Workman's Permit (Class I & Class II), Minimum two (02) years post qualification electrical jobs related work experience.
qualification.details: Passed Class 10th from a Government Recognized Board. Passed Trade Certificate in Electrician Trade issued by National Council for Vocational Training / State Council for Vocational Training. Must possess valid Electrical Workman's Permit (Class I & Class II) issued by Government Electrical Licensing Board. Minimum two (02) years post qualification electrical jobs related work experience in Government / Semi-Government/PSU/Public Limited/Private Organizations.

salary_details.details: Fixed Emolument: ₹ 21,450.00 per month (based on attendance including paid leave, holiday, if any). Variable Emolument: ₹ 825.00 per day (for each working day).

selection_process: Walk-in for Personal Assessment (100 marks) Qualifying marks: 50 for all categories

content_sections.heading: Oil India Contractual Electrician Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Oil India Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Oil India Contractual Electrician Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Oil India Contractual Electrician Vacancy Details 2026
Oil India Contractual Electrician Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Passed Class 10th from a Government Recognized Board. Passed Trade Certificate in Electrician Trade issued by National Council for Vocational Training / State Council for Vocational Training. Must possess valid Electrical Workman's Permit (Class I & Class II) issued by Government Electrical Licensing Board. Minimum two (02) years post qualification electrical jobs related work experience in Government / Semi-Government/PSU/Public Limited/Private Organizations.

content_sections.heading: Oil India Contractual Electrician Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Oil India Contractual Electrician Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years (General) Maximum Age: 38 years (OBC NCL)

content_sections.heading: Oil India Contractual Electrician Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Fixed Emolument: ₹ 21,450.00 per month (based on attendance including paid leave, holiday, if any). Variable Emolument: ₹ 825.00 per day (for each working day).

content_sections.heading: Oil India Contractual Electrician Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Registration for Walk-in for Personal Assessment

content_sections.heading: Oil India Contractual Electrician Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Walk-in for Personal Assessment (100 marks) Qualifying marks: 50 for all categories

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Oil India Contractual Electrician Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Oil India Contractual Electrician Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Oil India Contractual Electrician recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to report for registration and the personal assessment on 05 August 2026 between 07:00 A.M. to 09:00 A.M.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Contractual Electrician post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Class 10th, possess a Trade Certificate in Electrician Trade, and hold a valid Electrical Workman's Permit (Class I & Class II).

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum work experience required?
faq.answer: A minimum of two (02) years of post-qualification work experience in electrical jobs is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Contractual Electrician position?
faq.answer: The age limit is a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 35 years for General candidates. For OBC (NCL) candidates, the maximum age is 38 years.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Contractual Electrician post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Contractual Electrician post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Contractual Electrician?
faq.answer: The salary includes a Fixed Emolument of ₹ 21,450.00 per month and a Variable Emolument of ₹ 825.00 per day.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in for Personal Assessment, which carries 100 marks. Qualifying marks are 50 for all categories.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Oil India's Field Headquarters in Duliajan, Assam.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates bring to the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring original and self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, and permits.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
